title: cynoglossum argaeum
intro: Cynoglossum argaeum, also known as the Azeri Hound's Tongue, is a plant species belonging to the borage family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cynoglossum argaeum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, with some sources suggesting that it may also be used in ointments and salves for topical application.
